query: SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.productType, q.dataOrigin, q.createdAt, c.name as clientName FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.deletedAt IS NULL AND q.dataOrigin = 'manual' ORDER BY q.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.productType, q.dataOrigin, q.createdAt, c.name as clientName FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.deletedAt IS NULL AND q.dataOrigin = 'manual' ORDER BY q.createdAt DESC LIMIT 30;
